# XAUUSD Robot

> Free AI-powered XAUUSD (gold) trading robot / Expert Advisor (EA) for MetaTrader 4 and MetaTrader 5. The algo is provided free of charge when you open a trading account through a partner broker affiliate link. No subscriptions, no hidden fees. Educational information only — not financial advice.

## About
- Site: https://xauusdrobot.com/
- Product: BBFxAi XAUUSD Expert Advisor (automated gold trading algorithm for MT4/MT5)
- Model: Free EA via broker affiliate signup; no direct cost to the user
- Verified results: MyFXBook-verified live track record
- Contact: Telegram @BBFx_Ai

- [Home](https://xauusdrobot.com/): Overview, features, free EA download, broker list, FAQ

## Guides
- [XAUUSD Robot: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://xauusdrobot.com/blog/xauusd-robot-complete-guide/): What a gold trading robot is, how it works, and what to expect
- [How to Set Up a XAUUSD Robot on MT4 & MT5](https://xauusdrobot.com/blog/how-to-set-up-xauusd-robot-mt4-mt5/): Step-by-step install, backtest, and run guide
- [Best Gold EA for Prop Firm & FTMO Challenges](https://xauusdrobot.com/blog/best-gold-ea-prop-firm-ftmo/): Whether a gold EA can pass prop firm challenges, the rules that matter, and honest expectations
- [BBFxAi XAUUSD Expert Advisor Guide](https://xauusdrobot.com/blog/bbfxai-xauusd-expert-advisor-guide): Deep dive into the BBFxAi gold EA
- [BBFxAi XAUUSD Robot for MT5](https://xauusdrobot.com/blog/bbfxai-xauusd-robot-mt5-complete-guide): AI-powered gold trading, features, and FAQs

- [Do Gold Trading Robots Actually Work?](https://xauusdrobot.com/blog/do-gold-trading-robots-work/): Honest reality check on when XAUUSD robots succeed, when they fail, and how to spot a scam
- [Free XAUUSD Gold EA](https://xauusdrobot.com/blog/free-xauusd-gold-ea/): What the free gold EA includes, how the no-cost model works, and how to download and test it
- [Gold EA Strategy Types Explained](https://xauusdrobot.com/blog/gold-ea-strategy-types/): Scalping, grid, martingale, trend, breakout, mean-reversion and news strategies with risk levels
- [Best VPS for Gold EA Trading](https://xauusdrobot.com/blog/best-vps-gold-ea/): Latency, uptime and specs that matter for running a gold EA 24/5 on MT4 or MT5
- [How to Backtest a Gold EA Properly](https://xauusdrobot.com/blog/how-to-backtest-gold-ea/): Data quality, modelling quality, realistic spreads, forward testing and avoiding over-optimisation
- [Gold EA Risk Management](https://xauusdrobot.com/blog/gold-ea-risk-management/): Risk per trade, lot sizing, stop-loss, drawdown limits and daily loss caps

## Important Notes
- Trading gold (XAUUSD) and CFDs involves substantial risk of loss and is not suitable for every investor.
- Past performance and backtested results do not guarantee future results.
- This site earns affiliate commissions from broker referrals at no extra cost to the user.
